libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: No Docker image or environment/system property is indicated. For version 5.0.0, test code should use Jackson 3 imports such as `tools.jackson.databind.JsonNode` rather than Jackson 2 `com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.JsonNode`.

deterministic_setup.reason: jsonschema-module-swagger-2 is only a module for SchemaGenerator and declares jsonschema-generator as a provided dependency, so tests must add the aligned generator artifact explicitly.

The module derives schema attributes from Swagger 2.x annotations and declares swagger-annotations as provided; tests defining @Schema/@ArraySchema models need the annotation API on the test classpath.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8739 [Automation] javac compile fails for com.github.victools:jsonschema-module-swagger-2:5.0.0; label=fails-javac-compile; body_chars=8015

risks: Reusing the 4.38.0 test imports unchanged is likely to keep failing javac because victools 5.0.0 migrated from Jackson 2 to Jackson 3 packages.
Keep the generator version aligned with the module version; older generator versions are explicitly discouraged by the upstream docs.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: Meaningful tests need the main victools generator and Swagger annotation API because jsonschema-module-swagger-2 declares both as provided; v5 also migrated schema nodes to Jackson 3 tools.jackson types.
